endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/permissions
endpoints.description: Gets all permissions the caller has for a resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/{resourceProviderNamespace}/{parentResourcePath}/{resourceType}/{resourceName}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/permissions
endpoints.description: Gets all permissions the caller has for a resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENTRESOURCEPATH}} with a real parentresourcepath. Replace {{RESOURCETYPE}} with a real resourcetype. Replace {{RESOURCEPROVIDERNAMESPACE}} with a real resourceprovidernamespace. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCENAME}} with a real resourcename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /{roleDefinitionId}
endpoints.description: Gets a role definition by ID.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ROLEDEFINITIONID}} with a real roledefinitionid.

endpoints.name: GET /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions
endpoints.description: Get all role definitions that are applicable at scope and above.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.

endpoints.name: GET /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/{roleDefinitionId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ROLEDEFINITIONID}} with a real roledefinitionid. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.

endpoints.name: PUT /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/{roleDefinitionId}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates a role definition.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ROLEDEFINITIONID}} with a real roledefinitionid. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.

endpoints.name: DELETE /{scope}/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/{roleDefinitionId}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ROLEDEFINITIONID}} with a real roledefinitionid. Replace {{SCOPE}} with a real scope.
